prompt: Create a hyper-realistic vertical smartphone photo of a person holding a shrink-wrapped fictional game case in a Japanese video game shop. The foreground shows a left hand gripping a clear plastic Nintendo Switch-style case, tilted slightly toward the camera, with glossy reflections, plastic seams, and a believable retail barcode. The game cover is a dark gothic sci-fi fantasy RPG titled LUMINA GRAY with the subtitle Silent Nexus; the cover art features Lumina Gray, an elegant pale-skinned silver-haired heroine in ornate black-and-gold cybernetic armor, long flowing hair, exposed midriff, cape-like black fabric, gold circuit filigree, and a mysterious blurred face. Behind her is a towering nocturnal cathedral city filled with golden lights, vertical spires, floating mechanical rings, arcane clockwork symbols, and a luminous circular sigil in the upper right. Add Japanese cover copy near the top reading “運命に抗え” and “静寂の奥で、物語は目を覚ます”, plus small Japanese marketing text near the bottom, a rating badge “NX-15 AGES 15+”, publisher text “Astervel Works” and “Noctis Frame Interactive”, and a decorative compass-like emblem. The spine of the case also reads “LUMINA GRAY” and “Silent Nexus”. In the background, show a realistic store shelf packed with other boxed games in plastic cases, price tags in yen, black shelf rails, blurred cover art, and visible signs including “新作 NEW RELEASE 話題作”, “ALTERED HEARTS”, and “Echo”; use shallow depth of field so the held case is crisp and the shop background is softly blurred. Lighting should be moody retail fluorescent mixed with warm golden reflections from the cover, realistic hand skin texture and fingernails, documentary photo style, high detail, natural perspective, no illustration frame, no mockup flat lay.
